description: AI agent-driven product discovery, cart creation, and checkout via Store Sync and Cart Operations API

store_sync.description: Sync your product catalog so AI agents can discover and recommend products
flow: 1. Create product catalog via Store Sync API
2. Sync products, prices, inventory, and images
3. AI agents query catalog to find matching products

orders_v2: 1. AI agent creates cart via POST /v2/cart
3. Convert cart to order via POST /v2/checkout/orders
braintree: 1. AI agent creates cart via Store Sync / merchant API
2. Generate client token for payment UI
3. Buyer completes payment in Braintree Drop-in

integration_paths.orders_v2: Use PayPal Orders API v2 — standard REST approach
integration_paths.braintree: Use Braintree SDK — enterprise card processing and vault

best_practices: Keep product catalog in sync with your inventory system
Validate cart contents and prices server-side before checkout
Implement proper error handling for out-of-stock items
Follow PayPal response handling guidelines for consistent agent behavior
